section.div: The Typing Speed App helps users improve their typing accuracy and speed through interactive tests and exercises. It tracks words per minute (WPM) and errors, providing instant feedback to enhance performance. With customizable difficulty levels and engaging practice modes, the app is perfect for students, professionals, and anyone looking to type
